pages.title: Claude Code overview
pages.metaDescription: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that reads your codebase, edits files, runs commands, and integrates with your development tools. Available in your terminal, IDE, desktop app, and browser.

pages.title: Quickstart
pages.metaDescription: Welcome to Claude Code!
toc: Step 2: Log in to your account
Step 5: Make your first code change

Step 7: Fix a bug or add a feature
